Hi @Morgan - yes, agreed we have not been having stable DCAE healthcheck lately. The policy-handler issue is more recent, PV setup failure is causing POD to be not deployed (need to back trace when this problem started and see what commits causing this issue) - hoping this can be identified/fixed.

Dashboard problem is different though and very specific to Orange lab deployments (as daily jobs run in orange lab - we are seeing periodic/consistent failure); however both on azure and Windriver lab installation - dashboard comes up fine.  If the resource limit removal is not helping, one option may be to temporarily disable dashboard deployment on the override used in orange deployment (DCAE healthcheck list is generated based on what is enabled here - https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/dcaegen2/values.yaml; hence if Dashboard is disabled it will not include among healthcheck criteria)

> Hi @Morgan - yes, agreed we have not been having stable DCAE healthcheck lately. There was some good progress made on long standing issues for both Dashboard and PH last week.  PH fix is submitted here by Jack - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/122421. For Dashboard - possible rootcause has been identified for random failures; test container has been pushed to dockerhub and triggered for gating validation here - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/122079

@Sylvain @Morgan - I suppose we can move forward with merging this patch?
